zh.lifeSummary: 當Walter de Insula於1163年出生在英國英格蘭易斯爾 本 懷特時，他的父親Geoffrey De Insula24歲，母親Mrs. Goeffrey or Godfrey Insula48歲。他於大約1180年與Margaret在英國英格蘭結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世於1244年享年81歲。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Insula
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Galician: habitational name from any of the places called Insua, meaning ‘island, peninsula (of a river or of the sea), land by a river’, from Latin insula ‘island’.

nameMeanings.name: Walter
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French personal name of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from wald ‘rule’ + heri, hari ‘army’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to England, superseding the native Old English form, Wealdhere. It was a very popular name in medieval England, normally pronounced ‘Water’.

variants.name: Walther
meanings: from wald ‘rule’ + heri ‘army’; name of the famous medieval minnesinger Walther von der Vogelweide ( c.1170– c.1230 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Walter de Insula was born in 1163, in Isle of Wight, England, United Kingdom, his father, Geoffrey De Insula, was 24 and his mother, Mrs. Goeffrey or Godfrey Insula, was 48. He married Margaret about 1180, in England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died in 1244, at the age of 81.

Il a épousé Margaret environ 1180, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé en 1244, à l’âge de 81 ans.

ko.of Wootton, Isle of Wight, Hampshire, En: 영국 잉글랜드 함프실르 이슬일 프 와이트 보턴
ko.lifeSummary: Walter de Insula(이)가 1163년 영국 잉글랜드 이슬일 프 와이트에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Geoffrey De Insula(은)는 24세였고, 그의 어머니 Mrs. Goeffrey or Godfrey Insula(은)는 48세였다. 그는 대략 1180년 영국 잉글랜드에서 Margaret(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1244년 81세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Walter de Insula родился в 1163 г. в местности исл оф ваит, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Geoffrey De Insula было 24 года, а матери, которую звали Mrs. Goeffrey or Godfrey Insula, 48. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret около 1180 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер в 1244 г. в возрасте 81 год.
